idea-plugin.name: SchemaFlow
idea-plugin.description: Interactive database schema diagram inside JetBrains IDEs (IntelliJ, PyCharm, Rider, …). ER diagram with declared / observed / inferred relationships, diagram⇄SQL and a schema advisor. Reads SQL, Prisma, Django, SQLAlchemy and TypeORM from the open project.

action.description: Open the SchemaFlow diagram for this project
